steps.title: Find b from the y-intercept
steps.content:
The function is $f(x) = -a^x + b$. At the y-intercept of $y = f(x) - 15$, we have $x = 0$ and $y = -\frac{99}{7}$.

Since $a^0 = 1$, we have $f(0) = -1 + b$. Therefore: $$f(0) - 15 = -\frac{99}{7}$$ $$-1 + b - 15 = -\frac{99}{7}$$ $$b = 16 - \frac{99}{7} = \frac{13}{7}$$
